title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Researchers at the University of Cambridge use AI systems like AlphaFold and Gemini alongside structural biology to identify bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. This approach compresses analysis that previously took years into minutes, enabling faster development of new antimicrobial treatments.
